items.definition_en: An actor is a person who plays a role in a movie.
items.example_en: The actor smiled on the red carpet.

items.definition_en: A director is a person who leads a movie.
items.example_en: The director explained the scene to the actors.

items.definition_en: A screen is a large surface for showing movies.
items.example_en: We watched the film on a big screen.

items.definition_en: A ticket lets you enter the cinema.
items.example_en: I bought a ticket for the evening show.

items.definition_en: A seat is a place where you sit in the cinema.
items.example_en: Our seats were in the front row.

items.definition_en: Popcorn is a snack people often eat at the movies.
items.example_en: He ate a large box of popcorn.

items.definition_en: A movie theater is a place to watch movies.
items.example_en: The movie theater was very busy.

items.definition_en: A trailer is a short preview of a movie.
items.example_en: The trailer made me excited to see the film.

items.definition_en: A villain is the bad person in a movie.
items.example_en: The villain scared the audience.

items.definition_en: A hero is the main good character in a movie.
items.example_en: The hero saved everyone at the end.

items.definition_en: A costume is special clothing worn in movies.
items.example_en: The actress wore a beautiful costume.

items.definition_en: A camera is used to film movies.
items.example_en: The camera was large and expensive.

items.definition_en: A subtitle is written words on a movie screen.
items.example_en: The movie had English subtitles.

items.definition_en: An audience is the people who watch a movie.
items.example_en: The audience clapped at the end.

items.definition_en: A scene is part of a movie.
items.example_en: My favorite scene was the last one.

items.definition_en: A film is another word for a movie.
items.example_en: We watched a film on Friday night.

items.definition_en: A soundtrack is all the music in a movie.
items.example_en: The movie had a great soundtrack.

items.definition_en: An award is a prize a movie or person can win.
items.example_en: She won an award for her role.

items.definition_en: A star is a famous actor or actress.
items.example_en: The movie star greeted her fans.

items.definition_en: A ticket counter is where you buy tickets.
items.example_en: We waited at the ticket counter.
